headline: 4 Manufacturing Electronics Stocks to Watch Despite Industry Headwinds
summary: High operating costs and ongoing supply-chain challenges weigh on the Zacks Manufacturing - Electronics industry's near-term prospects. ETN, EMR, POWL and ENS are a few stocks investors should retain.
